'''Renforra''' was the site of an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] base during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Jon Vander/Legends|Jon Vander]] led the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] of [[Specter Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Specter Squadron]] from this headquarters.

{{Planet-stub}}
